Earthing Technical Requirements.description: Separate earthing will comply with EDI 0001 & EDI 100.

Substation Works.description: Install new 11kV 25kVA single phase Customer Only pole substation on a 12.5m/8kN pole

Substation Commissioning Responsibilitie.description: Substation commissioning is categorized as Customer Funded Non-Contestable Work

LV Works.description: Remove the Overhead (OH) LV cable currently located between pole ref '23' and pole ref '20' on the southern side of Elizabeth Drive.
String a new OH cable between pole ref '3' and pole ref '20' on the northern side of Elizabeth Drive.

Compliance Standards.description: Ensure all LV service works comply with the NSW Service and Installation Rules.
Confirm the design adheres to Endeavour Energy standards MDI0031 and MCI0005.

Service Connections.description: New OH road crossing service connection intended to maintain existing services.

SL_Material_Funding.description: Street Lighting materials fall under 'Customer Funded Contestable Works'.

Primary HV Method of Supply.description: Existing HV network in the area is energised at 11kV and currently is configured as a 2 phase supply. Proposal to tee off existing pole 890040 and erect 2 spans of overhead HV aerial mains to the subject property. Proposed to install 7/2.50 AAAC 'Chlorine' conductor. Erect a 11kV 25kVA single phase Customer Only pole substation on a 12.5m/8kN pole.

Visual HV Markups and Annotations.description: Proposed to install 7/2.50 AAAC 'Chlorine' conductor for overhead HV aerial mains.

HV Infrastructure Funding and Materials.description: Capital contribution for 11kV 25kVA Single Phase Pole Top Transformer.
Customer Funded Non-Contestable Works: Network switching, substation commissioning, contract inspection.

Compliance Standards.description: Separate earthing will comply with EDI 0001 & EDI 100.

items.item_description: Capital contribution for 11kV 25kVA Single Phase Pole Top Transformer.
Network switching, substation commissioning, contract inspection

Remittance and Restriction Requirements.description: Email for remittance copies: remittances@endeavourenergy.com.au; Credit cards and cheques are not accepted

Invoice Policy.description: Formal Tax Invoice will be provided following the receipt of payment

LandInterestGuidelines.description: Land Interests as specified in the Land Interest Guidelines (“LIG”) are required for this project: Registered Land Interest applicable – Non-Subdivision – See LIG Section 6. Please provide a draft Plan of Easement, Administration Sheets and Section 88B instrument or Draft Real Property Act dealing/s prior to certification. Land Interest to be registered prior to submission of the Letter of Intent for construction.

RequiredEasements.description: Pole 890040 is located within an existing easement on Lot 4 DP11798136

A new easement will be required over Lot 4 DP 11798136 north to Wombeyan Caves Rd for the purpose of erecting the new power line. The owner of Lot 4 DP 11798136 has been contacted and has agreed to create this easement on his property.
A new easement will be created over Lot 1 DP1179799 also. This land is owned by the proponent.
